# cirro_billing_account (Resource)

Manages a Cirro billing account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "cirro_billing_account" "example" {
  name                 = "Smith Lab"
  customer_type        = "INTERNAL"
  billing_method       = "BUDGET_NUMBER"
  primary_budget_number = "BDG-2024-001"
  owner                = "jsmith"
  shared_with          = ["jdoe", "alee"]

  contacts = [
    {
      name         = "Jane Smith"
      organization = "Acme Corp"
      email        = "jane@example.com"
      phone        = "+1-555-0100"
    }
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `billing_method` (String) Billing method: BUDGET_NUMBER, PURCHASE_ORDER, or CREDIT.
- `contacts` (Attributes List) Billing contacts (at least one required). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--contacts))
- `customer_type` (String) Customer type: INTERNAL, CONSORTIUM, or EXTERNAL.
- `name` (String) Billing account name.
- `owner` (String) Username of the billing account owner.
- `primary_budget_number` (String) Primary budget number or reference code.
- `shared_with` (List of String) Usernames the billing account is shared with.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `is_archived` (Boolean) Whether the billing account is archived.
- `organization` (String) Organization the billing account belongs to.

<a id="nestedatt--contacts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `contacts`

Required:

- `email` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
- `phone` (String)
